violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Many secondary containers holding food items were not labeled or dated to identify contents.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Several containers holding food without lids in prep cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood in need of cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. - Several buckets holding clean kitchen utensils and diner plates were not inverted to protect from contamination.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceilings and walls in the back prep area require repairs and a more thorough cleaning.
